question: YSR Kadapa team decides to compose the team with one fast bowler and one spinner and has a budget of only ₹ 26,500 to form a team. Then who among the following is not a member of that team satisfying all the conditions ?

If it is known that the stadium is favourable to spin bowling and YSR Kadapa team decided to select C and G compulsorily in the team, then what is the total amount spent by the team on selected players satisfying all the conditions ?

If it is known that the stadium is favourable to fast bowling and YSR Kadapa team decided to compose the team with two fast bowlers, then what would be the least amount that can be spent to form a team satisfying all the conditions ?
